en_definition: a major port of entry and the largest city in Washington; located in west central Washington on the protected waters of Puget Sound with the snow-capped peaks of the Cascade Range and Mount Ranier visible to the south and east; an aerospace and computer center; site of the University of Washington
tr_definition: Washington eyaletinin en büyük şehri ve önemli bir liman kenti; Puget Boğazı kıyısında yer alan, havacılık ve bilgisayar teknolojileri merkezi.
ru_definition: Крупнейший город штата Вашингтон и важный морской порт; центр аэрокосмической и компьютерной промышленности, расположенный на берегу залива Пьюджет-Саунд.
